title: HR Situational Judgment Test: Evidence-Based HR Decision-Making
description: Complete an online HR Situational Judgment Test with 27 HR management scenarios. Rate the effectiveness of HR tactics for each scenario. Receive a feedback report. Your responses contribute to research on HR education and decision-making. Online at bayoupal.nicholls.edu. Takes approximately 45–60 minutes. Free and confidential.
consent_text: By participating in this study, you agree to: (1) Complete the HR Situational Judgment Test assessment, (2) Allow your responses to be used for research purposes, (3) Understand that your responses will be de-identified for analysis. Your participation is voluntary and you may withdraw at any time. All data will be kept confidential and used only for research purposes. Feedback reports are made available. Contact Dr. Christopher Castille with questions.
